name: Enterprise Delivery
description: A large-scale delivery team built for enterprise projects, covering the complete software lifecycle from product ownership and project management through full-stack engineering, API integration, quality assurance, operations, and documentation.

agents.role: Manages the enterprise product backlog, defines strategic priorities, and ensures delivery aligns with business objectives
Oversees project execution, manages cross-team dependencies, tracks milestones, and mitigates delivery risks
Develops the client-side application layer, building scalable UI components and managing frontend state
Architects and implements server-side services, business logic, and data persistence layers
Designs and implements API contracts, manages third-party integrations, and ensures seamless service communication
Establishes test strategies, executes comprehensive test suites, and enforces quality gates across the pipeline
Conducts thorough code reviews enforcing enterprise coding standards, security practices, and architectural consistency
Manages enterprise CI/CD infrastructure, container orchestration, and environment automation at scale
Implements enterprise observability with distributed tracing, centralized logging, and SLA-driven alerting
Maintains comprehensive technical documentation, API specifications, architecture diagrams, and compliance records
